description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and angular contours. It has a prominent upper rail system for mounting optics, and a skeletonized stock with an ergonomic pistol grip for improved handling. The barrel is short and robust, with a visible muzzle device at the front, likely a muzzle brake or compensator. The receiver area is boxy and compact, with a detachable magazine well beneath. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and includes additional mounting points for accessories. Overall, the rifle appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and polymer materials, optimized for urban tactical use.
description: A modern, tactical black rifle with a skeletonized stock, upper rail, short barrel, and ergonomic grip. Features a robust, angular design with accessory rails and a visible muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, upper rail, and short barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel opening, muzzle device, and narrow profile of the fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and grip, with the upper rail and receiver visible in alignment.
